gene_region.label: HBB transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical HBB genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window relative to the reverse-strand transcription start, used to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: HBB encodes beta-globin, the beta subunit of adult hemoglobin that pairs with alpha-globin to transport oxygen in red blood cells.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local HBB bundle is hemoglobinopathy oriented. HBB findings depend strongly on exact allele, zygosity, phase with other globin variants, hematologic phenotype, and clinical classification.
variant_effect_overview: HBB missense, nonsense, splice, and regulatory variants can produce sickle hemoglobin, beta-thalassemia, or other hemoglobinopathy contexts.
Carrier and disease interpretations require phase, genotype combination, and hematology data.
condition_research_overview: Sickle cell disease and trait context
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: HBB methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a beta-globin oxygen transport, hemoglobin tetramer assembly, erythrocyte physiology, and hemoglobinopathy biology gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for HBB.
Because HBB biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.
Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against beta-globin oxygen transport, hemoglobin tetramer assembly, erythrocyte physiology, and hemoglobinopathy biology.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use HBB promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for beta-globin oxygen transport, hemoglobin tetramer assembly, erythrocyte physiology, and hemoglobinopathy biology.
Sickle cell disease and trait context

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000244734: HBB coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: HBB biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: beta-globin oxygen transport, hemoglobin tetramer assembly, erythrocyte physiology, and hemoglobinopathy biology
recommended_icons: Vessel cross-section with red  blood cells (anemic)
Blood vessel (with red  blood cells, anemic)
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests an HBB hemoglobinopathy thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to beta-globin structure, oxygen transport, sickle hemoglobin, beta-thalassemia, or carrier/disease review. Interpretation requires exact allele, zygosity, phase, and hematology context.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs334 (HBB HbS / Glu6Val) is curated as a HBB marker for Sickle cell disease and trait context, Beta-thalassemia and hemoglobinopathy review. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the beta-globin oxygen transport, hemoglobin tetramer assembly, erythrocyte physiology, and hemoglobinopathy biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag beta-globin oxygen transport, hemoglobin tetramer assembly, erythrocyte physiology, and hemoglobinopathy biology.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
associated_conditions: Sickle cell disease and trait context
research_context: Use this marker as a HBB pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs334 (HBB HbS / Glu6Val) with HBB methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.
